system.description:
### Tier 4 Extreme Traversal The exterior hull of a massive vessel caught in an eternal storm. Lightning strikes the metal plates while the wind threatens to tear you into the abyss. Impulses: Cling to the hull, outrun the storm, sell out a secret.

#### Features Lightning Discharge - Action: At the start of the GM turn, roll a d6. On a 5 or 6, lightning strikes a random zone. All creatures in that zone must make an Agility Reaction Roll (20). On a failure, they take 3d10+10 tech damage. This damage cannot be reduced by using Shield Slots.

Is the sky purple or blinding white when the bolt hits? Does the smell of ozone overwhelm your senses?

Information Overload - Passive: The Advanced ship broadcasts tactical data intended to demoralize. Whenever a PC spends Hope, they must first make a Presence Reaction Roll (20). On a failure, they must mark 1 Stress to successfully spend that Hope, as the Ship whispers their deepest failures into their comms.

Whose voice does the Broker use to mock you? What secret from your past is being broadcast?

Shifting Hull Plates - Reaction: When a PC rolls with Fear, the massive radiator plates of the ship shift. The PC must make a Strength Reaction Roll (20). On a failure, they are pinned between plates, becoming Restrained and taking 1d12 Direct Physical Damage.

Can you hear the grinding of the massive gears over the roar of the storm? }}
